mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM board_t WHERE active = 0 AND category = #{_parameter}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO board_t (title, category, content, author) VALUES (#{title}, #{category}, #{content}, #{author})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_t SET title=#{title}, category=#{category}, content=#{content} WHERE b_idx = #{b_idx}
UPDATE board_t SET active = 1 WHERE b_idx = #{b_idx}
UPDATE board_t SET views = views + 1 WHERE b_idx = #{b_idx}
mapper.select: SELECT c_idx, b_idx, author, content, reg_date FROM comment_t WHERE b_idx = #{b_idx} ORDER BY c_idx ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comment_t (b_idx, author, content) VALUES (#{b_idx}, #{author}, #{content})
mapper.update: UPDATE board_t SET comments = comments + 1 WHERE b_idx = #{b_idx}
UPDATE board_t SET comments = GREATEST(0, comments - 1) WHERE b_idx = #{b_idx}
